contract_excerpt:
MATERIAL Transfer AGREEMENT
PARTIES
The UNIVERSITY OF AUCKLAND, a university constituted under the University of Auckland Act 1961 and a tertiary education provider under the Education and Training Act 2020, of 22 Princes Street, Auckland, New Zealand (University)
[INSERT FULL LEGAL NAME] a [insert jurisdiction and entity type e.g. New Zealand company], [insert e.g. NZBN number], of [registered address]] (Provider)
INTRODUCTION
The University is a research institution and wishes to obtain Original Materials held by the Provider for use for research.
AGREEMENT
The Provider agrees to provide the University with Original Materials, and the University accepts those materials, on the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
CONTRACT DETAILS 
EXECUTED
SCHEDULE [X]
[Title of Schedule e.g. Approved Purpose]
[Insert OR N/A]
GENERAL TERMS
DEFINITION

evidence: The Provider agrees to provide the University with Original Materials
The University is a research institution and wishes to obtain Original Materials held by the Provider for use for research
MATERIAL Transfer AGREEMENT
output.reason: The contract’s core subject is the transfer of physical research materials (“Original Materials”) from a Provider to the University for research, without mention of data transfer, joint research, or commercial funding. This matches the Material Transfer Agreements definition and markers. The contract is clear and unambiguous, so confidence is high.

contract_excerpt:
DATA Transfer AGREEMENT
PARTIES
The UNIVERSITY OF AUCKLAND, a university constituted under the University of Auckland Act 1961 and a tertiary education provider under the Education and Training Act 2020, of 22 Princes Street, Auckland, New Zealand (University)
[INSERT FULL LEGAL NAME] a [insert jurisdiction and entity type e.g. New Zealand company], [insert e.g. NZBN number], of [registered address]] (Provider)
INTRODUCTION
The University is a research institution and wishes to obtain a copy or copies of data held by the Provider. 
AGREEMENT
The Provider agrees to provide the University with a copy or copies of the Data, and the University accepts the Data, on the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
CONTRACT DETAILS 
EXECUTED
SCHEDULE [X]
[Title of Schedule X]
[Insert OR Not Used]
GENERAL TERMS
DEFINITIONS AND INTERPRETATION
In this A

evidence: DATA Transfer AGREEMENT
The Provider agrees to provide the University with a copy or copies of the Data
the University accepts the Data, on the terms and conditions of this Agreement
output.reason: The agreement’s core purpose is to transfer a dataset from the Provider to the University, as indicated by explicit references to 'Data Transfer Agreement' and provisions for the supply and acceptance of data. There are no indications of physical materials, confidentiality-only, joint research/collaboration, flow-down from a Funder, or commissioned research/services.

contract_excerpt:
SUBCONTRACTOR AGREEMENT
PARTIES
The UNIVERSITY OF AUCKLAND, a university constituted under the University of Auckland Act 1961 and a tertiary education provider under the Education and Training Act 2020, of 22 Princes Street, Auckland, New Zealand (University)
[[INSERT FULL LEGAL NAME] a [insert jurisdiction and entity type e.g. New Zealand company], [insert e.g. NZBN number], of [registered address]] (Subcontractor)
INTRODUCTION	
The University has been granted funding by the Funder to undertake the Research Project.
The University wishes to engage the Subcontractor to provide services for the Research Project.
AGREEMENT
The University engages the Subcontractor to provide, and the Subcontractor agrees to provide, the Services on the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
CONTRACT DETAILS
EXECUTED
SCHEDULE 1
SERVICES
Background
Research

evidence: The University has been granted funding by the Funder to undertake the Research Project.
The University wishes to engage the Subcontractor to provide services for the Research Project.
The University engages the Subcontractor to provide, and the Subcontractor agrees to provide, the Services on the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
output.reason: The contract clearly outlines an arrangement where the University, funded by a Funder for a research project, engages a third party (Subcontractor) to deliver defined services for the project. This matches the definition and markers for a Subcontract: flow-down of obligations from a prime/funded project, a Statement of Work, and engagement of a subcontractor.

contract_excerpt:
RESEARCH SERVICES AGREEMENT
PARTIES
The UNIVERSITY OF AUCKLAND, a university constituted under the University of Auckland Act 1961 and a tertiary education provider under the Education and Training Act 2020, of 22 Princes Street, Auckland, New Zealand (University)
[[INSERT FULL LEGAL NAME] a [insert jurisdiction and entity type e.g. New Zealand company], [insert e.g. NZBN number], of [registered address]] (Client)
INTRODUCTION
The University is a provider of research services. 
The Client wishes to engage the University, and the University agrees, to provide certain research services.
AGREEMENT
The Client engages the University to provide, and the University agrees to provide, the Services on the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
CONTRACT DETAILS
EXECUTED
SCHEDULE 1
SERVICES
Services
Research/Project overview
[Insert description of

evidence: The Client engages the University to provide ... research services.
The University is a provider of research services.
The Client wishes to engage the University ... to provide certain research services.
output.reason: The contract is between the University and a company (the Client), and involves the University providing research services to the Client for their benefit. There are no references to a public/government funder, physical materials or datasets, subcontracting, or collaboration as peers, and the language clearly indicates a commercial arrangement to deliver research services.

contract_excerpt:
RESEARCH COLLABORATION AGREEMENT
PARTIES
The UNIVERSITY OF AUCKLAND, a university constituted under the University of Auckland Act 1961 and a tertiary education provider under the Education and Training Act 2020, of 22 Princes Street, Auckland, New Zealand (University)
(details of collaborator) (Collaborator)

INTRODUCTION
A	The University is an academic research institution. 
B	The Collaborator and the University wish to collaborate to carry out certain research.
AGREEMENT
The parties agree to collaborate in carrying out research on the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
CONTRACT DETAILS 
EXECUTED
GENERAL TERMS
DEFINITIONS AND INTERPRETATION
In this Agreement: 
Affiliate of a party means any entity that controls or is controlled by that party, or is under common control with that party, or a director, officer or member of personnel

evidence: "Collaborator and the University wish to collaborate to carry out certain research."
"The parties agree to collaborate in carrying out research on the terms and conditions of this Agreement."
"RESEARCH COLLABORATION AGREEMENT"
output.reason: The contract title and text make clear this is an agreement in which both parties are collaboratively conducting research. There is explicit mention of joint research activity, fulfilling the definition and decision rule for Collaboration Agreements.

contract_excerpt:
CONFIDENTIAL DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
PARTIES
The UNIVERSITY OF AUCKLAND, a university constituted under the University of Auckland Act 1961 and a tertiary education provider under the Education and Training Act 2020, of 22 Princes Street, Auckland, New Zealand (University)
[INSERT FULL LEGAL NAME and address of the other party, including NZBN number and registered office, if applicable] ([XXX])
contract details
Introduction
The parties have identified a mutual interest in sharing Confidential Information for the Purpose.
Each party acknowledges that the other party’s Confidential Information may have commercial value or otherwise be of a sensitive nature. 
AGREEMENT
In consideration for the disclosure of the Disclosing Party’s Confidential Information, the Recipients agrees to comply with this Agreement.
EXECUTED
GENERAL TERMS
DEFINITIONS AN

evidence: CONFIDENTIAL DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
mutual interest in sharing Confidential Information for the Purpose
consideration for the disclosure of the Disclosing Party’s Confidential Information
output.reason: The contract is solely about sharing and protecting confidential information with no deliverables, fees, or transfer of materials or data, matching the definition of a Confidential Disclosure Agreement.

contract_excerpt:
STUDENT RESEARCH PROJECT AGREEMENT
PARTIES
The UNIVERSITY OF AUCKLAND, a university constituted under the University of Auckland Act 1961 and a tertiary education provider under the Education and Training Act 2020, of 22 Princes Street, Auckland, New Zealand (University)
[Insert full legal name and address of Client, including company number and registered office, if applicable] (Client)
[Insert full legal name and address of Student] (Student)

INTRODUCTION
A	The Student wishes to undertake the Research as part of the requirements to fulfil an academic course of study at the University.  
B	The Client wishes to support the Student to carry out the Research.  The Student agrees to carry out, and the University agrees to provide supervision and other assistance for, the Research, in accordance with the terms of this Agreement. 
AGREEMENT
T

evidence: STUDENT RESEARCH PROJECT AGREEMENT
The Student wishes to undertake the Research as part of the requirements to fulfil an academic course of study at the University.
The Client wishes to support the Student to carry out the Research.
output.reason: Three-party agreement (University, Client, Student) in which the Student undertakes the Research as part of an academic course of study, the Client supports it, and the University supervises.
